promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next concrete residual paired-family refinement immediately after the historyop A2-mid batch preserved the pairwise restart boundary and deferred this pair.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the strongest family-level seams: non-AB pair identity, local evidence without repo-top admission, MI-name versus machine-zero-MI reality, nonzero SAgB branch split with zero negativity, and an explicit AB-sibling next-family boundary.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The prior historyop A2-mid batch provides the preceding residual-pair shell, the residual-coverage batch provides the pairwise residual-lane boundary, and the sims evidence-boundary batch provides the local evidence versus repo-top omission pattern.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because the adjacent AB-coupled sibling must stay comparison-only in this turn and begin the next bounded family.
Not selected because it would erase the executable-contract and metric boundary preserved by the parent batch.
Not selected because the parent family batch already contains the needed bounded seams.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent paired-family batch plus nearby A2-mid sims anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable non-AB family-shell, evidence-status, naming-vs-metric, and sibling-boundary packets without reopening raw sims files.

candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest shell for the second residual paired family.

quarantined_items.name: LOCAL_EVIDENCE_PLUS_CATALOG_AS_REPOTOP_ADMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Local evidence emission and catalog visibility are both weaker than repo-top evidence admission.

quarantined_items.name: MI_DISCRIMINATOR_NAME_AS_MATERIAL_MI_SIGNAL
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves machine-scale MI means and MI delta in the non-AB family.

quarantined_items.name: ZERO_NEGATIVITY_AS_TOTAL_BRANCH_INVARIANCE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Zero negativity does not erase the stored nonzero SAgB branch split preserved by the parent batch.

quarantined_items.name: NONAB_AND_AB_SIBLING_AS_ONE_FAMILY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The adjacent AB-coupled sibling changes both executable contract and stored MI behavior, so naming proximity is not enough to merge them.

quarantined_items.name: COMPACT_RESULT_FORMAT_AS_STRONG_MI_PROOF
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Compact output shape and explicit MI delta fields are weaker than the stored metric magnitudes, which remain effectively machine-zero.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the strongest reusable family-level packets from the non-AB discriminator batch without reopening raw sims files.
They keep family identity, evidence status, naming-vs-metric reality, nonzero SAgB branch sensitivity, and the AB-sibling boundary distinct instead of collapsing them into one story.
They remain small, source-linked, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later residual family work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain evidence-strength overreads, filename-overreads, invariance-overreads, sibling-merge overreads, or compact-format overreads rather than reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated entirely from existing intake artifacts after the required control-surface reads already completed earlier in the thread.
Used nearby A2-mid sims batches only as comparison anchors.
No raw source reread, runtime execution, or A2-1 mutation was performed.
